# =========================================================
# NFL Late-Game Decision Support Tool
# Data Processing Script
# =========================================================


# 0. Libraries

library(dplyr)
library(nflreadr)
library(tibble)


# 1. Helper functions

safe_mean <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

safe_median <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

map_play_bucket <- function(play_type) {
  case_when(
    play_type %in% c("run") ~ "Run",      
    play_type %in% c("pass") ~ "Pass",
    play_type %in% c("qb_spike") ~ "Spike",
    play_type %in% c("qb_kneel") ~ "Kneel",
    play_type %in% c("field_goal") ~ "Field Goal Attempt",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

bucket_time <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x <= 30 ~ "0-30",
    x <= 60 ~ "31-60",
    x <= 90 ~ "61-90",
    x <= 120 ~ "91-120",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

bucket_score <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x <= -8 ~ "Down 8+",
    x <= -4 ~ "Down 4-7",
    x <= -1 ~ "Down 1-3",
    x == 0 ~ "Tied",
    x <= 3 ~ "Up 1-3",
    x <= 7 ~ "Up 4-7",
    x >= 8 ~ "Up 8+",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

bucket_yardline <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x <= 20 ~ "1-20",
    x <= 40 ~ "21-40",
    x <= 60 ~ "41-60",
    x <= 80 ~ "61-80",
    x <= 99 ~ "81-99",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}


# 2. Parameters / file paths

seasons_to_use <- 2015:2025

project_path <- "C:/Users/dchee/Documents/Grad School/MSDS 456 - Sports Performance Analytics/Final Project"

base_rds_path <- file.path(project_path, "simulator_base.rds")
summary_rds_path <- file.path(project_path, "simulator_summary_mvp.rds")


# 3. Load raw play-by-play data

pbp <- nflreadr::load_pbp(seasons_to_use) %>%
  as_tibble()


# 4. Keep only columns needed for the project

pbp_small <- pbp %>%
  select(
    season,
    game_id,
    play_id,
    drive,
    qtr,
    posteam,
    defteam,
    home_team,
    away_team,
    game_seconds_remaining,
    half_seconds_remaining,
    score_differential,
    yardline_100,
    down,
    ydstogo,
    play_type,
    posteam_timeouts_remaining,
    defteam_timeouts_remaining,
    touchdown,
    field_goal_result,
    interception,
    fumble_lost,
    epa,
    desc
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(game_id),
    !is.na(play_id),
    !is.na(drive),
    !is.na(posteam),
    !is.na(down),
    !is.na(ydstogo),
    !is.na(yardline_100),
    !is.na(score_differential)
  )


# 5. Create late-game subset
#    - End of Half = Q2 with <= 120 seconds in half
#    - End of Game = Q4 with <= 120 seconds in game

pbp_late <- pbp_small %>%
  mutate(
    situation_type = case_when(
      qtr == 2 & half_seconds_remaining <= 120 ~ "End of Half",
      qtr == 4 & game_seconds_remaining <= 120 ~ "End of Game",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(situation_type))


# 6. Compute seconds burned on the immediate next play

pbp_late <- pbp_late %>%
  arrange(game_id, play_id) %>%
  group_by(game_id) %>%
  mutate(
    next_game_seconds_remaining = lead(game_seconds_remaining),
    next_half_seconds_remaining = lead(half_seconds_remaining),
    sec_elapsed_next_play = case_when(
      situation_type == "End of Half" ~ half_seconds_remaining - next_half_seconds_remaining,
      situation_type == "End of Game" ~ game_seconds_remaining - next_game_seconds_remaining,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    sec_elapsed_next_play = if_else(
      !is.na(sec_elapsed_next_play) &
        sec_elapsed_next_play >= 0 &
        sec_elapsed_next_play <= 60,
      sec_elapsed_next_play,
      NA_real_
    )
  )


# 7. Collapse detailed play types into app-friendly buckets

pbp_late <- pbp_late %>%
  mutate(
    next_play_bucket = map_play_bucket(play_type)
  )


# 8. Build drive-level outcomes
#    These are eventual outcomes of the drive from that point

drive_outcomes <- pbp_small %>%
  group_by(game_id, drive) %>%
  summarize(
    drive_td = as.integer(any(touchdown == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    drive_fg = as.integer(any(field_goal_result == "made", na.rm = TRUE)),
    drive_turnover = as.integer(any(interception == 1 | fumble_lost == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    drive_any_score = as.integer(drive_td == 1 | drive_fg == 1),
    drive_outcome = case_when(
      drive_td == 1 ~ "TD",
      drive_fg == 1 ~ "FG",
      drive_turnover == 1 ~ "Turnover",
      TRUE ~ "No Score"
    )
  )


# 9. Join drive outcomes back to late-game play-level data

simulator_base <- pbp_late %>%
  left_join(drive_outcomes, by = c("game_id", "drive")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(drive_outcome))


# 10. Keep only the play types used in the app

simulator_base <- simulator_base %>%
  filter(next_play_bucket %in% c("Run", "Pass", "Spike", "Field Goal Attempt", "Kneel"))


# 11. Add simulator buckets
#    These are the inputs used on the Situation Simulator tab

simulator_base <- simulator_base %>%
  mutate(
    clock_remaining = case_when(
      situation_type == "End of Half" ~ half_seconds_remaining,
      situation_type == "End of Game" ~ game_seconds_remaining,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    time_bucket = bucket_time(clock_remaining),
    score_bucket = bucket_score(score_differential),
    yardline_bucket = bucket_yardline(yardline_100)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(time_bucket),
    !is.na(score_bucket),
    !is.na(yardline_bucket)
  )


# 12. Build summary table for simulator tab
#    One row per:
#    situation_type x time_bucket x score_bucket x yardline_bucket x play_bucket

simulator_summary_mvp <- simulator_base %>%
  group_by(
    situation_type,
    time_bucket,
    score_bucket,
    yardline_bucket,
    next_play_bucket
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    avg_sec_elapsed = safe_mean(sec_elapsed_next_play),
    median_sec_elapsed = safe_median(sec_elapsed_next_play),
    avg_yardline = safe_mean(yardline_100),
    avg_epa = safe_mean(epa),
    p_td = safe_mean(drive_td),
    p_fg = safe_mean(drive_fg),
    p_any_score = safe_mean(drive_any_score),
    p_turnover = safe_mean(drive_turnover),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# 13. Join bucket-level metrics back onto simulator_base
#    This supports:
#    - historical evidence table
#    - KPI summaries
#    - selected drive detail view later

simulator_base <- simulator_base %>%
  left_join(
    simulator_summary_mvp %>%
      select(
        situation_type,
        time_bucket,
        score_bucket,
        yardline_bucket,
        next_play_bucket,
        p_any_score,
        avg_epa
      ),
    by = c(
      "situation_type",
      "time_bucket",
      "score_bucket",
      "yardline_bucket",
      "next_play_bucket"
    )
  )


# 14. Final column order
#    Keep identifiers needed for selected-drive table:
#    game_id, drive, play_id

simulator_base <- simulator_base %>%
  select(
    situation_type,
    season,
    game_id,
    play_id,
    drive,
    qtr,
    posteam,
    defteam,
    game_seconds_remaining,
    half_seconds_remaining,
    clock_remaining,
    time_bucket,
    score_differential,
    score_bucket,
    yardline_100,
    yardline_bucket,
    down,
    ydstogo,
    posteam_timeouts_remaining,
    defteam_timeouts_remaining,
    next_play_bucket,
    sec_elapsed_next_play,
    epa,
    avg_epa,
    drive_outcome,
    drive_td,
    drive_fg,
    drive_any_score,
    p_any_score,
    drive_turnover,
    desc
  )


# 15. Save outputs

saveRDS(simulator_base, "simulator_base.rds")
saveRDS(simulator_summary_mvp, "simulator_summary_mvp.rds")

cat("Saved simulator_base.rds\n")
cat("Path:", base_rds_path, "\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(simulator_base), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(simulator_base), "\n\n")

cat("Saved simulator_summary_mvp.rds\n")
cat("Path:", summary_rds_path, "\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(simulator_summary_mvp), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(simulator_summary_mvp), "\n")


# 16. QC checks
#    Keeping these for validation

cat("\n=== QC: simulator_base ===\n")
print(range(simulator_base$season, na.rm = TRUE))
print(table(simulator_base$situation_type, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_base$score_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_base$time_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_base$yardline_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_base$next_play_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\n=== QC: simulator_summary_mvp ===\n")
print(range(simulator_summary_mvp$n, na.rm = TRUE))
print(dim(simulator_summary_mvp))
print(table(simulator_summary_mvp$situation_type, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_summary_mvp$score_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_summary_mvp$time_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_summary_mvp$yardline_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))
print(table(simulator_summary_mvp$next_play_bucket, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\n=== QC: example rows from simulator_summary_mvp ===\n")
print(
  simulator_summary_mvp %>%
    arrange(desc(n)) %>%
    select(
      situation_type,
      time_bucket,
      score_bucket,
      yardline_bucket,
      next_play_bucket,
      n,
      p_any_score,
      avg_epa
    ) %>%
    head(20)
)
